task_completion.description: Open a Chart and a SuperDOM window for SPY
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Chart window and a SuperDOM window are visible on the screen, and both clearly display 'SPY' in their title bars or instrument input fields.

task_completion.description: Link the SPY windows using the Red instrument link
task_completion.visual_evidence: The instrument link icon (a small square in the top right corner of the window) is set to the color Red for both the SPY Chart and the SPY SuperDOM windows.

task_completion.description: Open a Chart and a Time & Sales window for AAPL
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Chart window and a Time & Sales window are visible on the screen, and both clearly display 'AAPL' in their title bars or instrument input fields.

task_completion.description: Link the AAPL windows using the Blue instrument link
task_completion.visual_evidence: The instrument link icon (a small square in the top right corner of the window) is set to the color Blue for both the AAPL Chart and the AAPL Time & Sales windows.

task_completion.description: Ensure no other windows are open besides the Control Center and the 4 configured windows
task_completion.visual_evidence: Only the NinjaTrader Control Center, the two SPY windows (Chart, SuperDOM), and the two AAPL windows (Chart, Time & Sales) are visible. No other extraneous NinjaTrader windows are open.

Evidence of the workspace being saved, such as the agent clicking 'Save' in the Workspaces menu, or the active workspace name in the bottom right corner of the Control Center appearing without an asterisk (an asterisk indicates unsaved changes).

integrity.description: The agent used the NinjaTrader 8 GUI to configure the workspace
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent interacting with NinjaTrader 8 menus (e.g., 'New' menu) and window controls, rather than editing XML workspace files in a text editor.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual NinjaTrader 8 application
integrity.visual_evidence: The windows exhibit standard NinjaTrader 8 UI elements, icons, and realistic rendering of charts, DOM, and Time & Sales data (or standard loading states).

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands or scripts to bypass UI configuration
integrity.visual_evidence: No command prompt, PowerShell, or script execution windows are visible generating the workspace files directly into the C:\Users\Docker\Documents\NinjaTrader 8\workspaces directory.

privileged_info_for_vlm: NinjaTrader 8 supports instrument linking via colored squares located in the top right corner of its windows. 'Red' and 'Blue' are valid link colors. 'SPY' (State Street SPDR S&P 500 ETF) and 'AAPL' (Apple Inc.) are valid instruments. The required window types (Chart, SuperDOM, Time & Sales) are standard NinjaTrader 8 windows accessible via the 'New' menu. In NinjaTrader 8, an unsaved workspace is denoted by an asterisk (*) next to its name in the Control Center; saving removes this asterisk. The default workspace directory is C:\Users\Docker\Documents\NinjaTrader 8\workspaces.
